untranslatable_reason: Pattern detection (broadening top formation identification and visual structure analysis) cannot be expressed using only price, volume, and technical indicators from the allowed list. Broadening top requires detecting expanding ranges and peaks/valleys patterns that need multi-bar candle structure analysis beyond available primitives.
translation_notes: Signal requires pattern recognition (broadening top formation, support level identification, breakout confirmation) which is not translatable to mechanical indicator conditions. Entry approximated with price breaking below pivot support (s1) as proxy for breakout from broadening formation. Exit uses reversal above SMA_20 as reasonable contrary signal. 80% success rate and 15% average decline noted from source. Stop-loss set to 2% per author emphasis on essential risk management. Target regime limited to TRENDING_DOWN per signal specification.
